meaning: 什里夫波特[美国路易斯安那州西北部城市]
examples: The following year, he began teaching history at a small college in Shreveport.
Born in 1948 in Shreveport, Louisiana, Marilyn Minter lives and works in New York City.
As I watched all this in my little hotel room in Shreveport, I understood how both sides felt.
He bought the entertainment and merchandising rights to Olie from creator William Joyce of Shreveport, La.
The difference being that, even if you knew somebody, you couldn't get a room in Shreveport.
